bugs.class: stale-effect (useEffect omits userId from deps; orders never refetch when userId changes)
unhandled-rejection (fetch chain has no .catch and no r.ok check; network/HTTP errors are unhandled)
N+1 (sequential awaited fetch per product id in a loop; should batch/Promise.all)
off-by-one (slice(0, 6) yields 6 items for a top-five strip)
missing-key (list items rendered without a key prop)
